# Amazon Bedrock User Guide - Document History (Complete Changelog)

## Latest Update
**February 27, 2026**

---

## All Documented Changes (Most Recent First)

### February 2026
- **Converse API support for batch inference** (Feb 27, 2026): Use Converse API format for batch inference input data with consistent request format across models
- **Fine-tuning open-weight models with OpenAI APIs** (Feb 17, 2026): Create, monitor, and manage reinforcement fine-tuning jobs through OpenAI SDK endpoints (Files API, fine-tuning jobs APIs, inference APIs)

### December 2025 - January 2026
- **Service tier model support updates** (Dec 31, 2025): Updated list of models for priority and flex service tiers
- **Blueprint instruction optimization** (Dec 18, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Data Automation supports document blueprint instruction optimization with ground truth labels
- **New managed IAM policies** (Dec 3, 2025):
  - AmazonBedrockMantleFullAccess
  - AmazonBedrockMantleReadOnly
  - AmazonBedrockMantleInferenceAccess
- **OpenAI compatible API endpoints** (Dec 3, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Mantle provides OpenAI-compatible endpoints including Responses API and Chat Completions API for asynchronous inference
- **Reinforcement fine-tuning** (Dec 3, 2025): New reinforcement fine-tuning feature to improve foundation model performance
- **Reserved service tier** (Nov 26, 2025): New "Reserved" service tier for Bedrock inference
- **Claude Opus 4.5 support** (Nov 24, 2025): New Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5 model available
- **Cross-account Guardrails sharing** (Nov 21, 2025): Share guardrails across AWS accounts

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-04-01. No new entries since February 27, 2026.
